---
title: "About"
---

## Biography

Political Science and International Studies undergraduate at the University of Idaho with research interests in
political behavior, public opinion, electoral legitimacy, comparative politics, public policy, and human rights.
Experienced in quantitative and qualitative research, literature review, data management, academic writing,
and conference presentation. Skilled in R, SPSS, Python, LATEX, Overleaf, Excel, and data analysis.

## Education
- B.S. Political Science and International Studies, University of Idaho (expected 2027)

## Skills
- R, Python, SPSS, Stata
- Quantitative research design and regression modeling
- Survey analysis and data visualization
- LaTeX and academic writing

## Languages
- Bengali (native)
- English (Fluent)
- Hindi (professional)
- Urdu (professional)
- Arabic (intermediate)
